name: GLOMUS TUMOR OF STOMACH
definition: rare benign vascular tumor that originates from glomus body

demographics.Path: dilated irregularly shaped thin-walled vessels (= modified capillaries) covered by nests
demographics.Histo: sheets of monotonous round cells interspersed with numerous delicate vessels

dominant_finding: change in shape + size during fluoroscopy (similar to lipoma)
discriminating_features: CHARACTERISTIC strong peripheral homogeneous enhancement in arterial + portal venous
SPECIFIC peripheral nodular enhancement pattern + delayed filling-in (reminiscent of
solitary smooth intramural / intraluminal subepithelial mass ± mucosal ulceration
